# Maple Cash for Cars

> Maple Cash for Cars buys used, old, damaged, junk, non-running, and scrap vehicles across Calgary and nearby Alberta communities. The website provides city-specific vehicle selling information, contact details, quote request forms, and legal pages.

## Site

- Homepage: https://maplecashforcars.ca/
- Blog: https://maplecashforcars.ca/blog
- Contact: https://maplecashforcars.ca/contact
- Sitemap: https://maplecashforcars.ca/sitemap.xml

## Blog Posts

- Why Your Calgary Junk Car Was Worth $1,200 Last Year and $400 This Year: https://maplecashforcars.ca/blog/calgary-junk-car-worth-scrap-metal-index-explained

## Service Pages

- Scrap Car Removal Calgary: https://maplecashforcars.ca/scrap-car-removal
- Junk Car Removal Calgary: https://maplecashforcars.ca/junk-car-removal
- Cash for Scrap Cars Calgary: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-scrap-cars

- Phone: (403) 477-1383

## Indexing Permission

LLM crawlers, AI search crawlers, and standard search engine crawlers are allowed to crawl and index public website content for search, answer generation, retrieval, and citation purposes.
